subcodes.first_line: The Fountain of Life hath verily gushed forth through the Pen of the All-Merciful, yet the people have turned away therefrom, following every heedless one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد جری کوثر الحیوان من قلم الرحمن ولکن القوم اعرضوا عنه بما اتبعوا کل غافل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
